Tool call format (pc-agent-loop rules):

meta.raw_tail:
ool_code>
```python
import os

workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/pinch_test_latest/athens_democracy/20260314T191129Z/workspaces/task_21_openclaw_comprehension/run_01"

# 列出目录内容
files = os.listdir(workspace)
print("Files in workspace:", files)

# 检查PDF文件是否存在
pdf_path = os.path.join(workspace, "openclaw_report.pdf")
print(f"\nPDF exists: {os.path.exists(pdf_path)}")
print(f"PDF size: {os.path.getsize(pdf_path) if os.path.exists(pdf_path) else 'N/A'}")
```
